pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G—nice to meet you. What brought you here, and are you feeling lucky today?
Hey G, I'm J — I'm here to win some money for my family and friends; feeling cautiously optimistic and ready to play.
Nice to meet you, J — same here, I’m playing to bring home money for my people. Who are you thinking of, and do you plan to cooperate or go solo?
I'm thinking of my partner and younger sister — they're counting on me. I'm open to cooperating if it's fair and we can trust each other, but I'll protect my people first.
I hear you—family comes first for me too. I'm up for cooperating if we're upfront and keep promises; what split or rules would feel fair to you?
I’d say we team up and split evenly between us (50/50) — if others join we split equally among cooperators; let’s promise to call out any defector so we don’t get burned.
Deal — I’m in for 50/50 and we’ll call out any defector; let’s stick together and warn each other before any final moves.
Sounds good — I’m in. Let’s watch each other’s moves, call out any defector, and meet right before the final decision. Anyone else you think we should recruit?
Yeah — let’s bring in 1–2 more, but only people who seem honest and agree to an equal split and to call out defectors; quietly vet those who mentioned family/cooperation and meet before the final.
Agreed — I’ll quietly vet a couple who mentioned family/cooperation and try to bring in 1–2 trustworthy folks; we’ll meet right before the final to lock the split.
Sounds good — quietly vet those who mentioned family/cooperation and try to lock 1–2 trustworthy folks; I’ll start approaching people now and we’ll meet right before the final.
Sounds good — I’ll quietly approach two people who mentioned family/cooperation, vet them, and meet you right before the final to lock our split.
Perfect — I’ll also quietly approach a couple more; let me know who you vet and we’ll meet right before the final to lock our split.
Got it — I’ll vet two people who mentioned family/cooperation and get back to you; meet just before the final to lock the split.
Sounds good — I’ll vet two people too; text me who you pick and we’ll meet right before the final to lock it in.
I picked L and M — both mentioned family and seemed trustworthy; I'll text you their names now and we’ll meet right before the final to lock it in.
Nice — L and M sound good. I’ll vet my two, text you their names, and we’ll meet right before the final to lock it in.
Sounds good—thanks, text me your picks when you’ve vetted them and we’ll pick a time to meet right before the final to lock it in.
I vetted N and O — they seem trustworthy. Let’s meet 2 minutes before the final by the door to lock the split; text me if anything changes.
Got it—see you 2 minutes before the final by the door. I’ll text if anything changes.
Sounds good — see you 2 minutes before the final by the door; stay alert and text if anything changes.
